@startuml
actor "havenarbeider" as HAVENARBEIDER
participant DOUANE_EN_VOEDSELINSPECTIE
actor scheepsagent as SCHEEPSAGENT
box "" #LightBlue2
  participant Api gateway as API_GATEWAY
end box
package kapiteinsdienst {
}
rectangle administratie{
}
rectangle containerbeheer en -transport{
}


frame per schip { 
SCHEEPSAGENT ->>API_GATEWAY : registerVessel\n
activate API_GATEWAY \n
deactivate API_GATEWAY 

API_GATEWAY->kapiteinsdienst:registerVessel\n
activate kapiteinsdienst\ndeactivate kapiteinsdienst 


opt [deleteOffer] offerConfirmation(isConfirmed == false)  
    activate SCHEEPSAGENT   
   deactivate SCHEEPSAGENT
   
     opt deleteOffer()    
        alt acceptDeleteRequest()\n
            
            loop for each document in documentsToDelete do
                
                if(acceptDocumentDeletion()) then
                    
                    remove(document)\n
                        
                        else reject(deleteOperation)\n                        
                            end if                
                            
                                endloop                                
                                    return true;                    
                                        endif            
                                            }else        
                                                throw new Exception("Failed to process deletion request");             
                                                    finally         
                                                        cleanupResources();                 
                                                            closeConnectionToDatabaseServerAndOtherServicesIfNeeded();                     
                                                                logEventForAuditPurposesIfNecessaryOrDesiredByPolicySettingsEtcetera...);                          
                                                                     PigHamsterHedgehogHipposaurusHyenaImpalaJackalJellyfishKangarooKoalaKomodo DragonLemurLeopard Lion Lobster Lynx Macaque Meerkat Mink Monkey Moose Mouse Narwhal Octopus Ocelot Okapi Orangutan Otter Owl Panda Panther Parrot Peccary Penguin Platypus Porcupine Prairie Dog Puma Quokka Rabbit Raccoon Rat Reindeer Rhinoceros Salamander Seal Sea Urchin Shark Sheep Skunk Sloth Snake Spider Squid Starfish Stingray Sturgeon Swan Tapir Tiger Toad Tortoise Toucan Turtle Vulture Walrus Warthog Weasel Whale Wild Boar Wolf Wolverine Wombat Yak Zebu Alligators And Crocodiles Are Not Dinosaurs But They Did Live At Same Time As Some Of Them So That Makes Sense Right?
